packages.name: Legacy Refresh
packages.subtitle: Mini Valet
packages.description: Quick maintenance clean for busy customers.
features: Rubbish removal (please remove items of value and significance)
Snow foam pre-wash to help remove contaminants
Two-bucket hand wash
Microfibre towel drying
Door shuts and rain channels wiped over
Wheel face cleaned
Tyres dressed
Thorough interior vacuum (including carpet, seats, mats & boot)
Dashboard, centre console and door panels wiped down
Windows and glass cleaned (internal/external)
packages.footerNote: Contact me if a more bespoke package is required

packages.name: Legacy Revival
packages.subtitle: Full Valet
packages.description: Full inside and out clean for a refreshed feel.
features: Rubbish removal (please remove items of value and significance)
Snow foam pre-wash to help remove contaminants
Iron fallout and tar removal process
Two-bucket hand wash
Microfibre towel drying
Deep cleaning of door/boot shuts, rain channel and metal frames/hinges
Finished with spray on ceramic wax (can last up to 12 months)
Deep clean of wheels
Tyres dressed
Restoration of exterior plastics (if required)
Windows and mirrors deep cleaned (Internal/external)
Deep vacuuming of seats, crevices, carpets and boot
Shampooing and wet-vac extraction of fabric seats and carpets
Shampooing and wet-vac extraction of floor mats
Leather seats are deep-cleaned and conditioned
Steam sanitation of dashboard, trim, air vents, centre console, steering wheel, and all door panels
Protection applied to dashboard, trim, air vents, centre console, and all door panels
External rubber restored (if required)

addons.name: Pet Hair Removal
addons.description: Complete removal of stubborn pet hair from carpets, seats, and boot areas.

addons.name: Engine Bay Plastics Wipe Down & Dress
addons.description: Wipe down and dressing of all engine bay plastics and covers.

addons.name: Headliner Stain Removal
addons.description: Delicate hand-cleansing to remove grease marks and stains from roof lining.

addons.name: Deeper Carpet & Boot Shampooed & Wet-Vac Extraction
addons.description: Full carpet and boot shampooed with wet-vac extraction for a deeper clean.

addons.name: Seats Shampooed & Wet-Vac Extraction
addons.description: All seats shampooed and wet-vac extraction for a thorough deep clean.

addons.name: Child Seat Wiped & Sanitised with Steam Cleaner
addons.description: Anti-bacterial steam cleaning and sanitisation of baby/child car seats.

addons.name: Headlight Restoration
addons.description: Restoration of cloudy, oxidised headlights to improve clarity and appearance.
